_comment: CHAMPION v14 on 2b89b33: TIED CANONICAL + z-loss 1e-4 (op4-safe canonical path) trained on 1B unique FineWeb-Edu tokens (fixes v13's 85M/30-epoch overfit; data is miner-chosen, excluded from op2). Panel/red-team recipe for the token-limited regime (~2.6 epochs, ~10 tok/param): DROPOUT 0 + weight_decay 0.01 (regularizers hurt when under-trained) + max_lr 4e-4 (king-proven low LR; every high-LR run overfit) + WSD 1-sqrt (stable 0.6/decay 0.4) + crown opt (muon 0.04/wd 0.05, embed 0.006) + best-ckpt + MAX tokens (9900 steps=2.60B). Beats v13 by killing repetition-overfit.
